items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario of onboarding new staff with a corporate template. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the scenario was executed or that the expected results were captured. The lack of specific traces or snapshots to confirm the scenario behavior leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
